item.title: Identifying outliers using a box plot in R
item.description: A box plot is used to visualize the distribution of data.We can use it to identify extreme values in a dataset, referred as outliers. The outliers are basically data values that are farthest away from other values in a distribution. Outliers can lead to misleading results in a statistical analysis.Lets say for example, you are interested in computing the average age of 10 University students whose ages(in years) were recorded as 3, 22,25,27,21, 24, 28, 19, 25, 26.

item.title: Learning data science the interesting way
item.description: Learning data science can be daunting task. With all the coding and the bugs, you can be easily lose the motivation to keep on learning.There are times when you are going to spend hours or even days try to figure out how the code you need to solve a problem or fix a bug. You can easily give up on learning if you find the coding and the techniques to be difficult and challenging.

item.title: Render LaTeX using KaTeX
item.description: Enable katex by adding katex = "true" to the front matter +++ katex = "true" +++ It’s almost a dropin alternative to the mathjax solution,you should just choose one of them. Inline math looks like this This is text with inline math $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} =1$ This is text with inline math $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} = 1$ and with math blocks: $$\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} =1$$ $$ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} = 1 $$

item.title: Hello R Markdown
item.description: R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.

this.eq(0)},last:function(){return this.eq(-1)},eq:function(a){var b=this.length,c=+a+(0a?b:0);return this.pushStack(c=0&&bc?[this[c]]:[])},end:function(){return this.prevObject||this.constructor(null)},push:f,sort:c.sort,splice:c.splice},m.extend=m.fn.extend=function(){var a,b,c,d,e,f,g=arguments[0]||{},h=1,i=arguments.length,j=!1;for("boolean"==typeof g&&(j=g,g=arguments[h]||{},h++),"object"==typeof g||m.isFunction(g)||(g={}),h===i&&(g=this,h--);ih;h++)if(null!=(e=arguments[h]))for(d in null!=a&&a==a.window},isNumeric:function(a){return!m.isArray(a)&&a-parseFloat(a)+1=0},isEmptyObject:function(a){var b;for(b in a)return!1;return!0},isPlainObject:function(a){var b;if(!a||"object"!==m.type(a)||a.nodeType||m.isWindow(a))return!1;try{if(a.constructor&&!j.call(a,"constructor")&&!j.call(a.constructor.prototype,"isPrototypeOf"))return!1}catch(c){return!1}if(k.ownLast)for(b in a)return j.call(a,b);for(b in a);return void 0===b||j.

item.title: About
item.description: I have a passion for data science and and machine learning. In this blog I share my ideas, knowledge and experiences in using R, Python and other open data science tools to solve data science and machine learning problems.

item.title: About me
item.description: I have a passion for data science and and machine learning. In this blog I share my ideas, knowledge and experiences in using R, Python and other open data science tools to solve data science and machine learning problems.
